'''zajusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanohaemoglobin|cyanohaemoglobin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanohaemoglobin|cyanohaemoglobin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zajusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjisith|zæjisith]] || [[word:zæjisij|zæjisij]] || [[word:zæjisish|zæjisish]] || [[word:zæjisi|zæjisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajujusuth|zajujusuth]] || [[word:zajujusuj|zajujusuj]] || [[word:zajujusush|zajujusush]] || [[word:zajujusu|zajujusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajusuth|zajusuth]] || [[word:zajusuj|zajusuj]] || [[word:zajusush|zajusush]] || [[word:zajusu|zajusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajufsuth|zajufsuth]] || [[word:zajufsuj|zajufsuj]] || [[word:zajufsush|zajufsush]] || [[word:zajufsuf|zajufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajusuthu|zajusuthu]] || [[word:zajusuju|zajusuju]] || [[word:zajusushu|zajusushu]] || [[word:zajusuku|zajusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajusuth|zajusuth]] || [[word:zajusuj|zajusuj]] || [[word:zajusush|zajusush]] || [[word:zajusu|zajusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajusuthul|zajusuthul]] || [[word:zajusujul|zajusujul]] || [[word:zajusushul|zajusushul]] || [[word:zajusukul|zajusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajusuthuthu|zajusuthuthu]] || [[word:zajusujuju|zajusujuju]] || [[word:zajusushushu|zajusushushu]] || [[word:zajusuku|zajusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajusuthun|zajusuthun]] || [[word:zajusujun|zajusujun]] || [[word:zajusushun|zajusushun]] || [[word:zajusukun|zajusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajusuthuoro|zajusuthuoro]] || [[word:zajusujuoro|zajusujuoro]] || [[word:zajusushuoro|zajusushuoro]] || [[word:zajusukuoro|zajusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
